mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FREE_BOARD_TBL ( BNO, -- USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, REGDATE, VIEWCNT ) VALUES ( SEQ_FREE_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT B.BNO, B.USER_ID as userId, B.TITLE, B.CONTENT, B.REGDATE, B.VIEWCNT as viewcnt, U.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM FREE_BOARD_TBL B JOIN user_tbl U ON B.USER_ID = U.user_id WHERE BNO = #{bno}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT B.BNO, B.USER_ID AS userId, U.NICKNAME AS nickname, B.TITLE, B.CONTENT, B.REGDATE, B.VIEWCNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL L WHERE L.BNO = B.BNO) AS likeCount FROM FREE_BOARD_TBL B JOIN user_tbl U ON B.USER_ID = U.user_id ORDER BY B.BNO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{startRow}
mapper.update: UPDATE FREE_BOARD_TBL SET VIEWCNT = VIEWCNT + 1 WHERE BNO = #{bno}
